Enum esriSurfaceConversionType

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Esri TIN attribute type for polygonization.

[Guid("0D575050-664C-11D3-AB38-0008C73FD50C")]
public enum esriSurfaceConversionType

Fields

esriDegreeAspect = 2

2: Uses degree aspect for polygonization.

esriDegreeSlope = 0

0: Uses degree slope for polygonization.

esriPercentageSlope = 1

1: Uses percentage slope for polygonization.
